title: raw#31 POPULATION_RG_COUPLING — V_sync ⊗ V_RG unified L_IX (Mk.IX)

evidence.semantics: Kuramoto population-dynamics potential V_sync(θ) = K · mean_pair (1 − cos(θ_i − θ_j)) / 2
Mk.IX RG-hierarchy potential V_RG = α·|ν − ν*|² + β·(1 − |Δφ|) + γ·exp(−ξ/N) minimised at Ising-2D critical point

evidence.composition: L_IX = T − V_struct − V_sync − V_RG + λ·I_irr

evidence.quote: raw#31 POPULATION_RG_COUPLING 공식 승급 (evidence drill ✓ task #23, V_sync+V_RG land ✓)

axiom_statement: At population scale (N ≥ 16 cells coupled via Kuramoto θ-projection), the RG hierarchy V_RG and the synchronization potential V_sync compose in the unified Lagrangian L_IX such that finite-size scaling (V_RG term-3 exp(−ξ/N)) drives the Kuramoto order parameter r(θ) → 1 only at the Ising-2D critical fixed point. Off-critical, V_sync remains positive and r < 1.
notes: Promotion event: evidence drill task #23 PASS + V_sync_kuramoto + V_RG land + L_IX unified integrator 100% coverage + 5-term stress test natural_gen5 5/5 → administrative gap closure 2026-04-25 (CP2 P2 게이트 line 182 ✓ flip).
